Your Trusted Plumbers in Lansing

Need of a Lansing plumber? Call Plumbers 911. We'll connect you with a skilled local plumber from our carefully vetted network of specialists. Call us at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) today.

Let the expert team at Plumbers 911 refer you to professional, skilled plumbers for all types of plumbing issues. Whether you're a business owner on Torrence or a homeowner near the country club, we can connect you with a reputable plumber in Lansing to take on any job, from drain cleaning and burst pipe repair to renovations and installations.

Why Hire Our Lansing Plumbers?

It's important to act quickly when a plumbing emergency happens. We save you time and energy by giving you one number to call for all Lansing plumbing issues. Our experts will listen to you and recommend a professional who offers skilled plumbing in Lansing. You can be confident that we've vetted every professional on our list.

We understand the uncertainty that comes with finding a reputable plumber for the job at hand, especially if you aren't a DIY enthusiast. That's why we've built a network of reliable plumbers in and around Lansing. All you have to do is make one simple phone call, and we'll put you in touch with the right local plumber for the job.

We focus on independent local plumbers with good reputations who offer quality work and personal service at reasonable prices for the people in their community.

Prescreened, Highly Qualified Lansing Plumbers

Every Lansing plumbing professional we work with is required to go through an extensive vetting process. Our plumbers must pass a drug test, complete our training program and demonstrate that they're reliable, safe and efficient before joining our network. We only work with plumbers who use the latest techniques and technologies to provide safe, high-quality services in a timely fashion. We also ensure that every plumber on our list is fully licensed, bonded and insured.

Lansing Plumbing Services Overview

Our team of Lansing plumbers are capable of taking on any residential and commercial plumbing job. The services provided by the plumbers in our network include:

Emergency Services: Get plumbing emergencies dealt with promptly by a professional, skilled and friendly local plumber. Our network has plumbers that can solve your problems, from burst pipes to backed-up drains or issues with faulty appliances.

Commercial Plumbing: No commercial job is too big or small. Our Lansing plumbing specialists can deal with kitchen or bathroom installations for commercial properties or plumbing for your workshop.  

Water Heater Repair: We know how frustrating a lack of hot water can be. If your water heater is tripping the circuit breaker, not maintaining pressure or simply not doing its job, we can arrange for a skilled local plumber to fix your system.

Drain Cleaning: Overflowing or backed-up drains present a significant health risk, not to mention the unpleasant smells from the sewage. Our plumbers use safe, effective and noninvasive drain cleaning techniques to get your wastewater flowing smoothly again.

Sewer Repair: If your sewage pipes are damaged, a replacement may be required. We'll help you find a plumber who can recommend a cost-effective solution to your sewer pipe issues.

Our network of plumbers can handle a variety of tasks. See other plumbing jobs they can tackle in the list below.
